changes.title: Highlights
changes.text:
- [Dev Environment](/docs/playable/code/plugin-in-browser/dev-environment): new icons, buttons, and labels to match the [Playworks Preview page](/docs/playable/unityplayworks/create-playable); better layout for smaller screens; improved warning messages for Post Effects and for fields supported only on Playworks; search bar for Playworks fields
- [Dynamic Batching](/docs/playable/optimise-your-builds/dynamic-batching): performance optimization — new vertex count limit per batch (1000), up to ~5% lower CPU usage
- Shader export optimization (up to ~10% faster): export only WebGL1 or WebGL2 shaders per target; improved export code; filter variants for the target WebGL before compile (unselected WebGL shaders skipped during compilation)
- Removed Unity 2020.3 support — see [supported Unity versions](/docs/playable/setup/dependencies#unity-engine-supported-unity-versions)

changes.title: Rendering
changes.text:
- Fix URP/Lit shader runtime compilation error
- [URP] Fix OpaqueTexture not working with Linear color space
- Fix MixedLights: shadowmask always exported
- Fix Point Lights blinking / extra brightness
- Fix Dynamic Batching breaking rendering on Android 10
- Fix export error: unrecognized pass type `XRMotionVectors`
- Fix Particle System: Cone shape and stretched billboard
- Fix Particles scaling for sprites with empty borders
- Fix Particle System on instantiated prefab
- [URP 2D] Fix `ScriptableRendererData` breaking on `Renderer2DData`
- Fix Reference Ambient Probe behaviour; removed "Bake Reference Ambient Probe" hack from Advanced Settings

changes.title: Other
changes.text:
- [Mesh Preview](/docs/playable/optimise-your-builds/optimising-assets/optimising-meshes#reduce-mesh-complexity) added to Meshes optimisation tab
- Fix Texture pixel APIs
- Fix broken plugin window
- Fix missing Error Codes for Playable Health Check
- [Unity 6] PHC TextMeshPro: "Fix Issue" works for "TextMeshPro not supported version" warning
- Improved Include/Exclude asset behaviour in Unity Editor
- Updated [Cinemachine](/docs/playable/code/unity-plugins/cinemachine) support information
